description.en: A versatile fruit often used as a vegetable. Thrives in warm conditions with consistent watering.

Stake or cage plants early for support

description.en: A root vegetable that grows best in loose, deep soil. Sweet and nutritious when freshly harvested.

Thin seedlings to proper spacing
Avoid rocky soil to prevent forking
Harvest when tops are about 1cm in diameter

description.en: A cool-season crop perfect for salads. Quick to grow and can be harvested multiple times.

Provide afternoon shade in hot weather

Bolts quickly in hot weather

Bring indoors before first frost
Never refrigerate fresh basil leaves

Use black plastic mulch to warm soil

Water consistently to prevent bitter taste

description.en: A kitchen staple that stores well. Plant sets for easiest growing experience.

Choose long-day or short-day varieties for your region
Mulch to suppress weeds and retain moisture

Do not eat green potatoes

tips: Do not harvest in the first year to let plants establish
Never eat the leaves - they contain oxalic acid
Pull stalks rather than cutting for better regrowth

description.en: Small pickling cucumbers harvested young and preserved in vinegar. A French condiment staple.
description.fr: Petits concombres a confire recoltes jeunes et conserves dans le vinaigre. Un incontournable de la cuisine francaise.

tips: Harvest daily at 3-5cm for traditional cornichons
Provide a trellis to keep fruits clean
Pickle within hours of harvesting for best crunch

description.en: A heat-loving vine producing sweet fragrant fruits. The Charentais melon is a French garden treasure.
description.fr: Une liane qui aime la chaleur produisant des fruits sucres et parfumes. Le melon charentais est un tresor du jardin francais.

tips: Slip from vine when ripe - stem separates easily
Limit to 3-4 fruits per plant for best size and sweetness
Use black plastic mulch to warm soil

description.en: A greenhouse or warm-climate cucumber producing long smooth fruits. Thin skin requires no peeling.
description.fr: Un concombre de serre ou climat chaud produisant de longs fruits lisses. Peau fine ne necessite pas d'epluchage.

tips: Train vertically for straight fruits
Remove male flowers on all-female varieties
Keep humidity high but ventilate to prevent mildew

description.en: Flat-leaved chives with a distinct garlic flavor. Popular in Asian dumplings and stir-fries.
description.fr: Ciboulette a feuilles plates avec une saveur d'ail distincte. Populaire dans les raviolis et sautes asiatiques.

tips: Cut regularly to prevent flowering and promote tender leaves
Blanch under a pot for yellow garlic chives (Chinese delicacy)
Divide clumps every 2-3 years

description.en: An essential herb of French cuisine with subtle anise flavor. Must be grown from divisions, not seed.
description.fr: Une herbe essentielle de la cuisine francaise avec une subtile saveur anisee. Doit etre multiplie par division.

tips: French tarragon cannot be grown from seed - buy plants
Protect crowns with mulch in cold winters
Best used fresh as flavor fades when dried

description.en: A delicate herb with subtle anise-parsley flavor. One of the classic French fines herbes.
description.fr: Une herbe delicate avec une subtile saveur d'anis-persil. L'une des fines herbes classiques francaises.

tips: Prefers cool shade - bolts quickly in heat and sun
Add at the end of cooking to preserve delicate flavor
Sow in autumn for winter windowsill harvest

description.en: A peppery herb traditionally paired with beans. Nicknamed the bean herb in many European cultures.
description.fr: Une herbe poivree traditionnellement associee aux haricots. Surnommee l'herbe aux haricots dans de nombreuses cultures.

tips: Add to bean dishes to improve flavor and reduce flatulence
Harvest before flowering for strongest flavor
Winter savory is a perennial alternative

description.en: A lemon-scented herb in the mint family. Calming herbal tea and excellent in desserts.
description.fr: Une herbe au parfum de citron de la famille de la menthe. Tisane apaisante et excellente dans les desserts.

tips: Spreads vigorously like mint - contain in pots
Makes a soothing bedtime herbal tea
Cut back hard in midsummer for fresh new growth

description.en: The most intensely lemon-scented herb available. A deciduous shrub prized for tisanes in France.
description.fr: L'herbe au parfum de citron le plus intense. Un arbuste a feuilles caduques prise pour les tisanes en France.

tips: Loses leaves in winter but returns in spring
Protect from frost - not fully hardy
Dried leaves retain their intense lemon scent

description.en: An ancient medicinal herb with bright blue flowers. Attracts bees and butterflies profusely.
description.fr: Une herbe medicinale ancienne avec des fleurs bleu vif. Attire abondamment les abeilles et papillons.

tips: Excellent companion plant attracting pollinators
Trim after flowering to keep compact
Used in liqueurs like Chartreuse

description.en: A beautiful blue-flowered herb that tastes like cucumber. Beloved by bees and an excellent companion plant.
description.fr: Une belle herbe a fleurs bleues au gout de concombre. Adoree des abeilles et excellente plante compagne.

tips: Freeze flowers in ice cubes for drinks
Self-seeds prolifically once established
Attracts pollinators and repels tomato hornworm

description.en: A cheerful daisy-like herb famous for its soothing tea. The doctor of the garden, improving neighboring plants.
description.fr: Une herbe joyeuse ressemblant a une marguerite celebre pour sa tisane apaisante. Le medecin du jardin.

tips: Harvest flowers when petals reflex back from the center
Dry flowers quickly in a warm airy place
Improves the health and flavor of neighboring plants

description.en: An evergreen tree or large shrub with aromatic culinary leaves. Essential in bouquet garni.
description.fr: Un arbre persistant ou grand arbuste aux feuilles aromatiques culinaires. Essentiel dans le bouquet garni.

tips: Can be grown in a large container and shaped
Pick leaves year-round - dried leaves have stronger flavor
Protect from cold winds in harsh winters

description.en: A prostrate variety of rosemary perfect for trailing over walls and containers. Same great flavor.
description.fr: Une variete prostrée de romarin parfaite pour retomber sur les murs et les conteneurs. Meme excellente saveur.

tips: Excellent trailing over raised bed edges
Needs excellent drainage - add gravel if needed
Same culinary uses as upright rosemary

description.en: A sweeter, more delicate cousin of oregano. Essential in Mediterranean and Middle Eastern cooking.
description.fr: Un cousin plus doux et delicat de l'origan. Essentiel dans la cuisine mediterraneenne et moyen-orientale.

tips: More frost-sensitive than oregano - grow as annual in cold climates
Add at end of cooking to preserve delicate flavor
Excellent in herb butter and salad dressings

description.en: A towering perennial herb tasting like intense celery. A single plant provides for the whole season.
description.fr: Une herbe vivace imposante au gout de celeri intense. Un seul plant suffit pour toute la saison.

tips: One plant is enough for most households
Use young leaves sparingly - very strong flavor
Hollow stems make natural drinking straws for Bloody Marys

description.en: A thorny bush producing tart green berries perfect for jams and fool. Very productive and long-lived.
description.fr: Un arbuste epineux produisant des baies vertes acidulees parfaites pour les confitures. Tres productif et durable.

tips: Prune to open center for air circulation and easy picking
Pick green for cooking or wait until soft and sweet for eating fresh
Tolerates more shade than most fruit bushes

description.en: A productive shrub bearing translucent red berries in clusters. Makes stunning jellies and sauces.
description.fr: Un arbuste productif portant des baies rouges translucides en grappes. Fait de magnifiques gelees et sauces.

tips: Fruit on old wood - prune to maintain framework
Net against birds as fruit ripens
Makes the classic French Bar-le-duc jelly

description.en: A richly flavored berry bush essential for cassis liqueur and jams. Extremely high in vitamin C.
description.fr: Un arbuste a baies richement parfumees essentiel pour la liqueur de cassis et les confitures. Tres riche en vitamine C.

tips: Prune out one-third of old wood each winter
Essential for creme de cassis and kir
Four times more vitamin C than oranges

description.en: An acid-loving shrub producing antioxidant-rich berries. Needs acidic soil to thrive.
description.fr: Un arbuste acidophile produisant des baies riches en antioxydants. Necessite un sol acide pour prosperer.

tips: Must have acidic soil (pH 4.5-5.5) - use ericaceous compost
Water with rainwater, not tap water
Plant two varieties for better cross-pollination

description.en: A vigorous bramble producing abundant dark berries in late summer. Thornless varieties now available.
description.fr: Une ronce vigoureuse produisant d'abondantes baies noires en fin d'ete. Varietes sans epines disponibles.

tips: Train on wires for easy management
Cut out fruited canes after harvest
Thornless varieties are much easier to manage

description.en: A tropical relative of the tomato producing sweet berries in papery husks. Ornamental and delicious.
description.fr: Un parent tropical de la tomate produisant des baies sucrees dans des enveloppes en papier. Ornemental et delicieux.

tips: Start indoors early like tomatoes
Fruits are ripe when husks turn papery and brown
Store in husks for several weeks

description.en: A cheerful edible flower with peppery leaves. Trap crop for aphids, protecting vegetables nearby.
description.fr: Une fleur comestible joyeuse avec des feuilles poivrees. Plante-piege pour les pucerons, protegeant les legumes.

tips: Poor soil produces more flowers, rich soil more leaves
Flowers, leaves, and seeds are all edible
Excellent trap crop drawing aphids away from vegetables

description.en: A bright orange medicinal flower used in salves and salads. Repels pests and attracts beneficial insects.
description.fr: Une fleur medicinale orange vif utilisee en baumes et salades. Repousse les nuisibles et attire les insectes utiles.

tips: Deadhead regularly for continuous blooming
Petals can be used as poor man's saffron
Self-seeds freely for next year

description.en: A powerful pest-repelling companion plant with a strong scent. Roots kill soil nematodes.
description.fr: Une puissante plante compagne repulsive avec un parfum fort. Les racines tuent les nematodes du sol.

tips: Plant around tomatoes to repel whitefly
Roots release compounds that kill soil nematodes
Deadhead regularly for continuous flowering

description.en: An elegant daisy-like flower that attracts pollinators and beneficial insects. Easy and graceful.
description.fr: Une fleur elegante ressemblant a une marguerite qui attire pollinisateurs et insectes utiles. Facile et gracieuse.

tips: Thrives in poor soil - too much fertilizer reduces flowering
Attracts hoverflies which eat aphids
Deadhead for months of continuous bloom

description.en: A compact sunflower variety perfect for borders and containers. Same cheerful flowers in a smaller package.
description.fr: Une variete compacte de tournesol parfaite pour bordures et conteneurs. Memes fleurs joyeuses en format reduit.

tips: No staking required unlike tall sunflowers
Great for children's gardens
Attracts pollinators throughout summer

description.en: A fast-growing Chinese cabbage with crisp white stems and tender green leaves. Ready in just weeks.
description.fr: Un chou chinois a croissance rapide avec des tiges blanches croquantes et des feuilles vertes tendres.

tips: Sow in late summer to avoid bolting
Baby pak choi can be harvested in 3 weeks
Protect from flea beetles with fleece

description.en: A tall barrel-shaped cabbage with a mild sweet flavor. Essential for kimchi and stir-fries.
description.fr: Un chou en forme de tonneau avec une saveur douce. Essentiel pour le kimchi et les sautes.

tips: Sow after midsummer to prevent bolting
Needs consistent moisture for tight heads
Use fleece to protect from flea beetles

description.en: A feathery Japanese mustard green with a mild peppery bite. Fast growing and cold hardy.
description.fr: Une moutarde japonaise plumeuse avec une touche poivree douce. Croissance rapide et rustique au froid.

tips: Cut-and-come-again for multiple harvests
Excellent in salad mixes and stir-fries
Survives light frost for extended autumn harvest

description.en: Fresh green soybeans harvested young in the pod. Rich in protein and fun to grow.
description.fr: Feves de soja vertes fraiches recoltees jeunes en gousse. Riches en proteines et amusantes a cultiver.

tips: Harvest when pods are plump but still green
Needs warm soil above 15C to germinate
Blanch pods in boiling water and eat with salt

description.en: A giant Japanese radish that can grow 30cm or more. Mild flavor and excellent for breaking compacted soil.
description.fr: Un radis japonais geant pouvant atteindre 30cm ou plus. Saveur douce et excellent pour decompacter le sol.

tips: Sow late summer for best results - bolts in spring
Deep roots break up compacted soil like a bio-drill
Grate fresh for a mild peppery condiment

description.en: A distinctive Japanese herb with cinnamon-basil flavor. Red and green varieties used in sushi and pickles.
description.fr: Une herbe japonaise distinctive avec une saveur de cannelle-basilic. Varietes rouges et vertes pour sushi et pickles.

tips: Red shiso is used to color umeboshi (pickled plums)
Pinch tips regularly for bushy growth
Self-seeds readily in warm climates

description.en: A stunning purple-tinged artichoke variety popular in Mediterranean gardens. Tender enough to eat raw.
description.fr: Une variete d'artichaut aux teintes violettes populaire dans les jardins mediterraneens. Assez tendre pour etre mange cru.

tips: Young buds can be sliced thin and eaten raw with lemon
Protect crowns in cold climates with straw mulch
Let a few heads bloom for spectacular purple thistle flowers

description.en: Small Spanish peppers typically mild but occasionally hot - eating them is Russian roulette for the palate.
description.fr: Petits poivrons espagnols generalement doux mais parfois piquants - les manger est une roulette russe pour le palais.

tips: Pick small (2-3cm) for mildest flavor
Blister in hot oil with coarse salt for classic tapas
Roughly 1 in 10 will be unexpectedly hot

description.en: Prolific bite-sized tomatoes bursting with concentrated sweetness. Perfect for snacking and salads.
description.fr: Tomates bouchees prolifiques eclatantes de douceur concentree. Parfaites pour le grignotage et les salades.

tips: Most forgiving tomato for beginners
Will often self-seed from dropped fruit
Extremely prolific - one plant can yield hundreds of fruits

description.en: A large ribbed tomato with meaty flesh and few seeds. The classic slicing tomato for sandwiches.
description.fr: Une grosse tomate cotelee a chair charnue et peu de graines. La classique tomate a trancher pour les sandwiches.

tips: Support heavy fruits with slings or nets
Limit to 4-5 trusses for largest individual fruits
Water consistently to prevent cracking

description.en: A striking dark-skinned heirloom with complex smoky sweet flavor. One of the finest-tasting tomatoes.
description.fr: Un heirloom a peau sombre frappant avec une saveur complexe fumee et sucree. L'une des tomates au meilleur gout.

tips: Skin darkens with more sun exposure
Harvest when shoulders are still slightly green
Complex flavor - best eaten raw at room temperature

description.en: A unique green-striped tomato with tangy citrus flavor. Ripe when stripes turn yellow-green.
description.fr: Une tomate unique a rayures vertes avec une saveur d'agrumes piquante. Mure quand les rayures deviennent jaune-vert.

tips: Ripe when the green lightens and yellow stripes appear
Tangy flavor is exceptional in salads and fried green tomatoes
Slightly softer when ripe compared to red varieties

description.en: The famous Basque pepper with gentle warmth. Traditionally dried on house facades in the Pays Basque.
description.fr: Le celebre piment basque a la chaleur douce. Traditionnellement seche sur les facades des maisons au Pays Basque.

tips: Mild heat (1000-4000 Scoville) - more flavor than fire
Dry by stringing and hanging in an airy spot
AOC protected - a true French terroir product

description.en: The world's most popular hot pepper with moderate heat and thick walls. Perfect for salsas and nachos.
description.fr: Le piment le plus populaire au monde avec une chaleur moderee et des parois epaisses. Parfait pour salsas et nachos.

tips: Pick green for classic jalapeno or red for more heat
Smoked jalapenos become chipotle peppers
Stress (less water) increases heat level

description.en: An intensely hot pepper with fruity tropical aroma. One of the hottest commonly grown peppers.
description.fr: Un piment intensement piquant avec un arome tropical fruite. L'un des piments les plus forts couramment cultives.

tips: Needs a long hot season - start indoors very early
Wear gloves when handling - extremely hot (100k-350k Scoville)
Fruity flavor shines in hot sauces and tropical salsas
